narrative:
Barberton City has 15,024 registered voters, with 60.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 10.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 18.6 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +7.7% D−R vs +23.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
